Oracle AWR Root Cause Analysis

Powered by a senior Oracle DBA investigation model — CPU, I/O, Concurrency, SQL regression detection

Disclaimer — Tool-Assisted Analysis

OraVision parses AWR snapshot HTML using heuristic rules, statistical thresholds, and pattern matching to surface a likely root cause. Output is a tool-assisted interpretation, not a definitive diagnosis. Validate every finding against the full database context, application behaviour, and any environmental changes not captured in the snapshot. False positives and missed signals are possible — always apply professional judgement before acting on the recommendations.
